menu_options.cloud_country: Cloud pairing (recommended — uses your Miele account, doesn't break the Miele app)
menu_options.direct_keys: Paste GroupID + GroupKey (for households whose key you already have)

cloud_country.title: Miele@LAN — country
cloud_country.description: Pick the country whose Miele cloud your account is registered with. This determines the OAuth tenant used for login.

cloud_authorize.title: Miele@LAN — authorise
cloud_authorize.description:
**Open this URL** in a browser on a device that can handle the `miele://` URL scheme:

* macOS with the MieleAuth.app installed (see the integration docs)
* iPhone/iPad with the Miele iOS app installed
* An Android phone with the Miele app installed

[Open the authorization URL]({authorize_url})

Log in with your Miele account. The browser will then redirect to `miele://oauth2-code/?code=…&state=…`. **Capture that full redirect URL and paste it below.** On macOS the MieleAuth.app writes it to `~/.miele_oauth_code.txt`.

cloud_tokens.title: Miele@LAN — paste tokens
cloud_tokens.description:
Use this path if you already did the OAuth flow externally (e.g. via the bundled `tools/miele_oauth_*.py` scripts) and have an `access_token` + `refresh_token` ready.

Paste the values from `~/.miele_oauth_tokens.json` here.

data.access_token: Access token (used once to fetch your household GroupKey)

direct_keys.title: Miele@LAN — paste household credentials
direct_keys.description:
Use this if you already have a household `GroupID` + `GroupKey` (e.g. from a previous local-provision, or extracted by hand from the cloud). HA will mDNS-browse the LAN for any appliance whose `group=` TXT matches — no host or device address needed.

Make sure your HA host is on the same LAN as the appliances.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Miele@LAN — new device
zeroconf_confirm.description: A new Miele device `{fab}` was found in your household (`{group_id}`). Confirm to reload the integration and pick it up.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — check host, network, and credentials.
error.invalid_credentials: GroupID must be 16 hex chars and GroupKey 128 hex chars.
error.invalid_redirect: The pasted URL is not a valid `miele://oauth2-code/...` redirect.
error.invalid_token: The pasted token is empty or malformed.
error.no_devices: Host reachable but no devices reported.
error.route_not_found: Provided route is not among the device's reported routes.

abort.oauth_failed: Cloud login failed — the authorisation code was rejected or the token endpoint returned an error.
abort.groupkey_failed: Could not fetch your household GroupKey from Miele cloud — your account may have no paired devices, or the API rejected our request.
abort.no_integration: Miele@LAN is not set up yet. Use 'Add Integration → Miele@LAN' first.
abort.different_household: Device belongs to a different Miele household.
abort.reloaded: Reloading the integration — the new device will be picked up automatically.
